attractions.name: Grand Place
attractions.seo_title: Grand Place Brussels: The Heart of Belgium
attractions.seo_description: UNESCO world heritage site, historic square.
attractions.description_long: The central square of Brussels, surrounded by ornate guildhalls and the Town Hall, offering a rich historical atmosphere.

attractions.name: Atomium
attractions.description_long: Designed for the 1958 Brussels World's Fair, this structure represents an iron crystal magnified 165 billion times.

attractions.name: Royal Palace of Brussels
attractions.seo_description: The official palace of the King.
attractions.description_long: The administrative residence of the King of the Belgians, situated in the heart of the capital.

attractions.name: St. Michael and St. Gudula Cathedral
attractions.seo_title: St. Michael and St. Gudula Cathedral
attractions.description_long: A beautiful Roman Catholic church that serves as the co-cathedral of the Archdiocese of Mechelen-Brussels.

attractions.name: Parc du Cinquantenaire
attractions.seo_description: Large urban park with triumphal arch.
attractions.description_long: Built to celebrate the 50th anniversary of Belgian independence, it features a grand arch and museums.

attractions.name: Mont des Arts
attractions.description_long: A historic site and garden offering one of the most stunning panoramic views of Brussels' city center.

attractions.name: Royal Museums of Fine Arts of Belgium
attractions.description_long: Home to an extensive collection of paintings, sculptures, and drawings from various historical periods.

attractions.name: Galeries Royales Saint-Hubert
attractions.description_long: One of the oldest covered shopping arcades in Europe, known for its refined glass roof and high-end boutiques.

attractions.name: Place Royale
attractions.seo_description: Historical square in the royal quarter.
attractions.description_long: A beautiful, symmetrical square designed in the late 18th century, housing several important buildings.

attractions.name: Belgian Comic Strip Center
attractions.description_long: Celebrates the rich heritage of Belgian comics, including Tintin and the Smurfs, in a beautiful art nouveau building.

attractions.name: Belfry of Bruges
attractions.seo_description: Medieval bell tower, symbol of the city.
attractions.description_long: A prominent medieval bell tower in the center of Bruges, offering panoramic city views.

attractions.name: Basilica of the Holy Blood
attractions.description_long: A beautiful 12th-century basilica that holds a relic claimed to contain the blood of Jesus Christ.

attractions.name: Groeningemuseum
attractions.description_long: Features a world-renowned collection of Flemish Primitive paintings, showcasing masters like Jan van Eyck.

attractions.name: Minnewater Lake
attractions.seo_description: The Lake of Love in Bruges.
attractions.description_long: Also known as the 'Lake of Love', this tranquil park is one of the most romantic spots in Bruges.

attractions.name: Church of Our Lady
attractions.description_long: Famous for holding the 'Madonna and Child' sculpture by Michelangelo, one of the few pieces outside Italy.

attractions.name: Grote Markt
attractions.description_long: The bustling heart of Bruges, surrounded by colorful guild houses and traditional cafes.

attractions.name: Begijnhof
attractions.description_long: A quiet, tranquil complex of small houses where lay religious women lived, founded in 1245.

attractions.name: Town Hall (Stadhuis)
attractions.description_long: An exceptional example of Gothic architecture dating back to the 14th century.

attractions.name: Historium
attractions.description_long: A family-friendly attraction that brings the history of 15th-century Bruges to life.

attractions.name: Choco-Story Museum
attractions.description_long: Explores the history of cocoa and chocolate making, with demonstrations and tastings.

attractions.name: Cathedral of Our Lady
attractions.description_long: A stunning Gothic cathedral containing several major works by Peter Paul Rubens.

attractions.name: Antwerp Central Station
attractions.description_long: Often called the Railway Cathedral, this is widely considered one of the most beautiful train stations in the world.

attractions.name: Rubens House
attractions.seo_description: Home and studio of Peter Paul Rubens.
attractions.description_long: The former residence and studio of the famous Baroque painter Peter Paul Rubens, now a museum.

attractions.name: Grote Markt Antwerp
attractions.description_long: The historic heart of Antwerp, featuring the 16th-century Town Hall and various guildhouses.

attractions.name: Museum aan de Stroom (MAS)
attractions.description_long: A stunning modern building offering panoramic views of the city and the river Scheldt.

attractions.name: Plantin-Moretus Museum
attractions.description_long: A UNESCO World Heritage site documenting the history of printing and the printing press.

attractions.name: St. Paul's Church
attractions.description_long: A stunning Baroque church rich with historic paintings, including works by Rubens, Van Dyck, and Jordaens.

attractions.name: Royal Museum of Fine Arts Antwerp
attractions.description_long: Houses a grand collection of art from the 14th to the 20th century.

attractions.name: St. Carolus Borromeus Church
attractions.description_long: An elaborate 17th-century Jesuit church famous for its Baroque facade and artistic interior.

attractions.name: Hendrik Conscience Heritage Library
attractions.description_long: A beautiful, historic library space with deep cultural significance in the heart of the city.

attractions.name: Gravensteen Castle
attractions.description_long: A historic castle dating back to the 12th century, serving as a powerful symbol of Ghent's history.

attractions.name: St. Bavo's Cathedral
attractions.description_long: Known for housing the world-famous 'Adoration of the Mystic Lamb' by the Van Eyck brothers.

attractions.name: Belfry of Ghent
attractions.description_long: The tallest belfry in Belgium, offering stunning views over the city skyline.

attractions.name: Graslei and Korenlei
attractions.description_long: The most picturesque spot in Ghent, featuring a row of historic guild houses along the canal.

attractions.name: St. Nicholas' Church
attractions.description_long: One of the oldest and most prominent churches in Ghent, showcasing Scheldt Gothic style.

attractions.name: MSK Gent (Museum of Fine Arts)
attractions.description_long: A rich museum covering European painting from the Middle Ages to the 20th century.

attractions.name: SMAK (Municipal Museum of Contemporary Art)
attractions.description_long: Dedicated to contemporary art, hosting exciting temporary exhibitions and a vast collection.

attractions.name: Vrijdagmarkt
attractions.description_long: A traditional market square that has played a key role in Ghent's history for centuries.

attractions.name: Design Museum Ghent
attractions.seo_description: Museum of design and applied arts.
attractions.description_long: Focuses on design from the Renaissance to the present day, housed in a historic mansion.

attractions.name: St. Peter's Abbey
attractions.description_long: A beautiful former Benedictine monastery featuring lovely gardens and rich history.

attractions.name: Liège-Guillemins Railway Station
attractions.description_long: A masterpiece of modern architecture designed by Santiago Calatrava, serving as the city's main train station.

attractions.name: Montagne de Bueren
attractions.description_long: A giant set of 374 steps offering a great workout and a unique view over the historic heart of the city.

attractions.name: Prince-Bishops' Palace
attractions.description_long: Located at the central Place Saint-Lambert, this grand palace has a rich historical significance for the city.

attractions.name: Collegiate Church of St. Bartholomew
attractions.description_long: One of the oldest and most important churches in Liège, renowned for its Romanesque architecture.

attractions.name: Musée de la Boverie
attractions.seo_description: Art museum in a beautiful park.
attractions.description_long: Housed in a beautiful building within the Boverie park, it hosts excellent art exhibitions.

attractions.name: Place du Marché
attractions.description_long: The lively heart of Liège, famous for its restaurants, bars, and traditional atmosphere.

attractions.name: Grand Curtius Museum
attractions.description_long: Displays a vast array of artifacts representing the history of Liège, from weapons to glass art.

attractions.name: St. Paul's Cathedral
attractions.description_long: A significant religious building featuring impressive Gothic architecture and art treasures.

attractions.name: Parc de la Boverie
attractions.description_long: A spacious green park perfect for leisurely strolls, located between the river Meuse and the Ourthe.

attractions.name: Opera Royal de Wallonie
attractions.description_long: A grand and historic venue dedicated to high-quality opera and musical performances.

attractions.name: Citadel of Namur
attractions.description_long: One of the largest fortresses in Europe, offering panoramic views over the confluence of the Sambre and Meuse rivers.

attractions.name: Saint Aubin Cathedral
attractions.description_long: A prominent religious monument in Namur, characterized by its impressive neoclassical architecture.

attractions.name: Félicien Rops Museum
attractions.seo_description: Art museum dedicated to the artist.
attractions.description_long: Features the works of the famous Belgian painter and printmaker Félicien Rops.

attractions.name: Belfry of Namur
attractions.description_long: A significant UNESCO heritage tower, serving as a landmark in the old town.

attractions.name: Saint-Loup Church
attractions.description_long: A magnificent Baroque church known for its ornate interior and historical architectural value.

attractions.name: Place du Vieux Marché
attractions.description_long: The charming historical center of Namur, perfect for dining and walking through history.

attractions.name: Archeological Museum of Namur
attractions.description_long: Explores the rich ancient history and archeological findings of the Namur region.

attractions.name: Jardin du Maïeur
attractions.description_long: A beautiful small garden nestled in the old town, offering a peaceful break for travelers.

attractions.name: Theatre de Namur
attractions.description_long: An elegant building hosting a wide range of theater and cultural performances.

attractions.name: Confluence of Sambre and Meuse
attractions.description_long: A beautiful natural point where two major rivers meet, offering great photo opportunities.

attractions.name: St. Rumbold's Cathedral
attractions.seo_description: Historic cathedral with a tall tower.
attractions.description_long: Famous for its massive tower, which offers breathtaking views and houses a famous carillon.

attractions.name: Grote Markt Mechelen
attractions.description_long: The central square, surrounded by beautiful guildhouses and historical architecture.

attractions.name: Kazerne Dossin
attractions.description_long: A deeply moving museum documenting the Holocaust and human rights history in Belgium.

attractions.name: Mechelen Town Hall
attractions.description_long: A striking historical building located at the edge of the Grote Markt.

attractions.name: Begijnhof Mechelen
attractions.description_long: A quiet, historic area characterized by small houses and picturesque streets.

attractions.name: Hof van Busleyden
attractions.seo_description: Museum in a historic city palace.
attractions.description_long: Housed in a grand Renaissance city palace, it showcases the history of Mechelen.

attractions.name: Dijlepad
attractions.description_long: A beautiful pedestrian path that runs along the Dijle river, offering great views of the city center.

attractions.name: Palace of Margaret of Austria
attractions.description_long: The former residence of Margaret of Austria, an important historical figure in Belgian history.

attractions.name: Technopolis
attractions.description_long: An interactive science and technology museum that's perfect for families and curious minds.

attractions.name: Vrijbroekpark
attractions.description_long: A large park featuring gardens, walking trails, and recreational facilities for all ages.

attractions.name: Belfry of Mons
attractions.description_long: A significant UNESCO-listed baroque bell tower, standing prominently in the city of Mons.

attractions.name: Grand Place Mons
attractions.description_long: The main square, a beautiful spot in the old town featuring cafes and historic buildings.

attractions.name: Collegiale Sainte-Waudru
attractions.description_long: A beautiful Gothic church, a major landmark known for its architecture and religious art.

attractions.name: Mons Memorial Museum
attractions.description_long: A serious and educational museum dedicated to the city's wartime history.

attractions.name: Musée des Beaux-Arts
attractions.description_long: Hosts a collection of fine art with various rotating exhibitions.

attractions.name: Mundaneum
attractions.description_long: A fascinating place dedicated to information and knowledge, often called the 'Google of paper'.

attractions.name: Van Gogh House
attractions.description_long: The house in the Mons area where Vincent van Gogh lived and worked for a period.

attractions.name: City Hall of Mons
attractions.description_long: A beautiful historical building at the heart of the city, known for its fine architecture.

attractions.name: Square des Martyrs
attractions.description_long: A pleasant city square to walk through while exploring the historic streets of Mons.

attractions.name: Jardin du Mayeur
attractions.description_long: A hidden, beautiful garden behind the City Hall, perfect for a short pause.

attractions.name: Cathedral of Our Lady of Tournai
attractions.description_long: An exceptional UNESCO World Heritage cathedral, one of the most important religious buildings in Belgium.

attractions.name: Belfry of Tournai
attractions.description_long: Recognized as the oldest belfry in Belgium, offering rich history and great views.

attractions.name: Grand Place Tournai
attractions.description_long: The historic heart of the city, surrounded by traditional buildings and lively terraces.

attractions.name: Fine Arts Museum of Tournai
attractions.description_long: Features a high-quality collection of art, including works by Manet and Rubens.

attractions.name: Pont des Trous
attractions.description_long: A significant medieval bridge that once protected the city, a true landmark of Tournai.

attractions.name: Natural History Museum Tournai
attractions.description_long: Features diverse exhibits related to natural history, science, and the region's heritage.

attractions.name: Museum of Folklore
attractions.description_long: Provides an interesting look into the traditional life and history of Tournai.

attractions.name: Cloth Hall (Halle aux Draps)
attractions.description_long: A beautiful historical trade building that testifies to Tournai's importance as a commercial city.

attractions.name: Parc Communal
attractions.description_long: A pleasant and well-maintained park, perfect for relaxing walks.

attractions.name: Saint-Brice Church
attractions.description_long: A historic church that is part of Tournai's rich religious heritage.

attractions.name: Leuven Town Hall
attractions.description_long: Renowned as one of the most beautiful town halls in the world, a true Gothic masterpiece.

attractions.name: Oude Markt
attractions.description_long: Famous as the longest bar in Europe, this vibrant square is packed with restaurants and cafes.

attractions.name: St. Peter's Church
attractions.description_long: A magnificent Gothic church, housing several important religious art pieces.

attractions.name: Leuven University Library
attractions.description_long: An iconic university building with a rich history and beautiful architecture.

attractions.name: Groot Begijnhof
attractions.description_long: A vast and incredibly peaceful Beguinage, featuring small brick houses and narrow streets.

attractions.name: Botanical Garden Leuven
attractions.seo_description: The oldest botanical garden in Belgium.
attractions.description_long: The oldest botanical garden in Belgium, offering a lush and educational environment.

attractions.name: M-Museum Leuven
attractions.seo_description: Museum for contemporary and old art.
attractions.description_long: Combines historic art with exciting contemporary exhibitions in a beautiful modern setting.

attractions.name: Parc Abbey
attractions.description_long: An incredibly well-preserved abbey complex located just outside the city center, perfect for a walk.

attractions.name: Fonske Statue
attractions.description_long: A small but famous statue that has become a symbol for the university city of Leuven.

attractions.name: Arenberg Castle
attractions.description_long: A beautiful castle located in the park area of the university campus in Heverlee.

adventure_locations.name: Hoge Veluwe National Park (Belgium equivalent - Hautes Fagnes)
adventure_locations.description_long: A massive, high-altitude peat moorland that offers unique hiking and nature experiences.

adventure_locations.name: Dinant (River Meuse adventure)
adventure_locations.description_long: A stunning town set against massive cliffs, offering kayaking and hiking along the river Meuse.

adventure_locations.name: Durbuy (The smallest city)
adventure_locations.description_long: Known as the smallest city, it is a hub for adventure sports like tree climbing and zip-lining.

adventure_locations.name: Semois Valley
adventure_locations.description_long: A winding river valley perfect for kayaking, canoeing, and long forest hikes.

adventure_locations.name: Grotten van Han (Han Caves)
adventure_locations.description_long: Massive, spectacular limestone caves that offer an underground adventure for all ages.

adventure_locations.name: Ardennes Regional Park
adventure_locations.description_long: The premier region in Belgium for hiking, cycling, and immersive nature adventures.

adventure_locations.name: Signal de Botrange
adventure_locations.description_long: The highest natural point in Belgium, featuring a viewing platform and surrounding trails.

adventure_locations.name: Lakes of Eau d'Heure
adventure_locations.description_long: A massive lake complex perfect for swimming, sailing, and various water sports.

adventure_locations.name: Fagne de Malchamps
adventure_locations.description_long: A protected peatland area offering boardwalk paths and rare natural beauty for adventurous hikers.

adventure_locations.name: Rochefort (Speleology & Nature)
adventure_locations.description_long: An incredible area known for its caves and adventurous outdoor hiking trails in the Ardennes.

country_cover_image.description: Grand Place, Brussels - Iconic Belgian architectural landmark
